technologies.title: 01. Technologies
technologies.subtitle: My stack is built for performance, scalability, and clean architecture.

projects.title: 02. Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Swipe through selected works demonstrating engineering capabilities.

homelab.title: GCP Free-Tier Home Lab
homelab.description: Production-grade microservices infrastructure on a restricted 1GB RAM instance. Hosts a Selenium bot, this landing page and more, all optimized via Linux swap management and Docker orchestration.

hackintosh.title: Dell Latitude 7480 Hackintosh
hackintosh.description: A highly optimized macOS Ventura environment running on non-Apple hardware. Features a custom OpenCore EFI, ACPI hot-patching, and specific driver tuning for ALPS I2C input devices.

polyglot.title: Polyglot Persistence
polyglot.description: A comprehensive architecture showcase demonstrating data handling across multiple database paradigms simultaneously, ensuring data integrity.

subteBot.title: Subte Alerta Bot
subteBot.description: An automated Telegram bot that provides real-time alerts for the Buenos Aires subway system. It scrapes data efficiently to keep commuters informed instantly.

cookieAnalyzer.title: Cookie Analyzer
cookieAnalyzer.description: A browser-based security tool to analyze tracking cookies, visualizing data flow and privacy risks for end-users in an intuitive interface.

tasks: Diagnosed and resolved complex hardware and software issues for a diverse client base.
Optimized system performance and implemented backup solutions for small businesses.
Provided consultation on hardware upgrades and network configurations.

university.description: Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Engineering, focusing on software architecture, data structures, and backend systems.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!

seo.description: Agustín Monetti — Software engineer in progess focused on backend, cloud infrastructure, and automation. Building scalable systems and automating processes.
